ns1:revision.ns1:text:
==Agenda== ===Monday, September 26th=== 8:45-9:45 Registration and Coffee
9:45-10:00 [[Media:EOFS_2011_Welcome.pdf|Welcome]], Aurelien Degremont
10:00-10:30 An update on both the 2.1 community release and also WC Lustre releases, Peter Jones
10:30-11:00 Coffee break
11:00-11:30 Lessons learned from Lustre file system operation, Roland Laifer, KIT
11:30-12:00 The Lustre file system at IHEP, Lu Wang, Institute of High Energy Physics - Beijing
12:00-12:30 Lustre 2 administration at CEA, Stéphane Thiell, CEA
12:30-14:00 Lunch
14:00-14:30 Lustre support in a Petaflopic environment, Alexandre Louvet, BULL
14:30-15:00 Visualization of Lustre RPC Traces with Vampir, Michael Kluge, TU Dresden
15:00-15:30 Hands on Lustre 2.x, Johann Lombardi, Whamcloud
16:00-16:30 The ClusterStor Engineered Solution for HPC, Torben Kling Petersen, Xyratex
16:30-17:00 Comprehensive ID Mapping in Lustre 2.X, Steve Simms, Indiana University
17:00-17:30 Evolving Lustre for Exascale, Eric Barton, Whamcloud
19:30-23:30 Social event: Dinner and Tour on Seine river
===Tuesday, September 27th=== 8:30 Breakfast
9:00-9:30 Lustre in CETA-CIEMAT, Alfonso Pardo Díaz, CETA-CIEMAT
9:30-10:00 Lustre as Data Acquisition File System at Diamond Light Source, Greg Matthews, Diamond Light Source Ltd.
10:00-10:30 Overview of Lustre Usage on JUROPA, Frank Heckes, Forschungszentrum Juelich
10:30-11:00 Coffee break
11:00-11:30 Lustre administration - and how it compares to its rivals, Daniel Kobras, Science+Computing AG
11:30-12:00 [[Media:EOFS_2011_RPE.pdf|Robinhood Policy Engine]], Thomas Leibovici, CEA
12:00-12:30 Whamcloud Lustre Management Tools, John Spray, Whamcloud
12:30-14:00 Lunch
14:00-14:30 [[Media:EOFS_2011_New_Hardware_Features_Lustre.pdf|An Exploration of New Hardware Features in Lustre]], Nathan Rutman, Xyratex
14:30-15:00 Wrap up, Aurélien Degrémont
[[Category: Events]]
